requirement_topic.en: Cell and Battery Pack Safety — NM / IEC 62133

summary.en: Mozambique generally applies INNOQ National Standards aligned to IEC for lithium battery and power bank safety. The relevant anchor is IEC 62133 (typically referenced through NM documentation). For regulated products, INNOQ conformity and import inspection may require test evidence showing conformity to the adopted NM/IEC requirements, including safety test coverage normally expected by transport and product safety frameworks.
summary.zh: 莫桑比克通常通过INNOQ国家标准的IEC采纳机制管理锂电池与移动电源安全，相关核心参考为IEC 62133。对于受监管产品，INNOQ合格评定与进口检验常要求提交符合所采用NM/IEC要求的测试证据，覆盖通常的安全性检验项。
summary.zht: 莫桑比克通常透過INNOQ國家標準之IEC採納機制管理鋰電池與行動電源安全，相關核心參考為IEC 62133。對於受監管產品，INNOQ合格評定與進口檢驗常要求提交符合所採納NM/IEC要求的測試證據，涵蓋通常的安全性檢驗項。

standards_or_laws: INNOQ National Standards (NM) system referencing IEC battery safety principles
IEC 62133 (portable lithium cells and batteries) as the common safety benchmark for this category

summary.en: China uses GB 31241 and related SAC/SAMR lines for lithium battery safety and technical compliance as part of domestic market requirements. These are close to the IEC family but include national deviations; therefore, INNOQ/IEC-aligned acceptance in Mozambique should be checked on the exact adopted NM reference and test report scope.
summary.zh: 中国以GB 31241及相关SAC/SAMR体系进行便携式锂电池安全与技术合规管理，虽然与IEC体系接近，但存在国家偏差，因此莫桑比克要求的INNOQ/IEC比对应基于具体采用的NM和测试报告范围确认。
summary.zht: 中國以GB 31241及相關SAC/SAMR體系進行便攜式鋰電池安全與技術合規管理，雖然與IEC體系接近，但存在國家偏差，因此莫桑比克要求的INNOQ/IEC比對應基於具體採納的NM和測試報告範圍確認。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241 — safety requirements for portable lithium cells and batteries
GB 18287 and related Chinese safety specifications where applicable

gap.en: GB 31241 or related Chinese reports are useful as technical evidence but do not automatically satisfy Mozambique in-scope import conformity if INNOQ requires NM-mapped evidence for the specific regulated item. Exporters should confirm which product types are treated as regulated in Mozambique and obtain evidence mapped to the current INNOQ route.
gap.zh: GB 31241及相关中国测试报告可作为技术性参考，但如果莫桑比克将该产品视为受监管项，不能自动满足其INNOQ路径的入境合规要求。出口商应确认具体产品是否属于受监管范围，并取得对应INNOQ路径的证据。
gap.zht: GB 31241及相關中國測試報告可作為技術性參考，但如果莫桑比克將該產品視為受監管項，不能自動滿足其INNOQ路徑的入境合規要求。出口商應確認具體產品是否屬於受監管範圍，並取得對應INNOQ路徑的證據。

mandatory_status.target: Conditionally mandatory for regulated items — INNOQ conformity evidence aligned to NM/IEC may be required before import inspection
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB 31241 / relevant GB-T requirements where applicable in China

source.publisher: Instituto Nacional de Normalizacao e Qualidade (INNOQ)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] INNOQ-aligned IEC safety evidence is the practical anchor in Mozambique. A GB 31241 report is often useful but should be mapped to the NM/IEC requirement the Mozambique authority expects for regulated products.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在莫桑比克，INNOQ对齐IEC的安全证据是实际执行锚点。GB 31241报告通常有参考价值，但应映射到莫桑比克对受监管产品要求的NM/IEC标准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在莫桑比克，INNOQ對齊IEC的安全證據是實際執行錨點。GB 31241報告通常有參考價值，但應映射到莫桑比克對受監管產品要求的NM/IEC標準。
